description: Company analytics page shows revenue and occupancy data
steps: Verify route 'company/analytics' is registered in routes.ts
Verify company.analytics.tsx renders date range selector (30d, 90d, 1y, all)
Verify company.analytics.tsx renders RevenueChart with monthly revenue
Verify company.analytics.tsx renders OccupancyChart with available/reserved/sold
Verify company.analytics.tsx renders RevenueByPropertyChart for flat vs house
Verify company.analytics.tsx renders property performance table
